checks.classification_repair_target_persistence: stripped_in_existing payloads and recursively stripped in new diagnosis-neutral branch
checks.raw_repair_reform_ids_model_visible: not_found_in_prompt_policy; covered by neutral ID tests

findings.description: The previous track-diagnosis render path reused _bundle_payload_and_audit. For logic_only/local_graph this calls _pruned_constraints_payload, which calls _t_box_pre_reform_constraints_payload. That helper branches on record["track"] and exposes pre-reform signature_before constraints or compact T-box inventory only for T_BOX records. This creates model-visible structure conditioned on gold track.
findings.impact: The v1 diagnosis gate failure is not cleanly interpretable because diagnosis context shape may have been confounded by the hidden label.

findings.description: New diagnosis-only bundles render sanitized case payloads, strip forbidden fields recursively, preserve neutral visible case IDs, avoid repair_target.constraint_delta, and suppress target-property L1/L3 local-graph leakage for all cases.

The existing A-box/T-box oracle repair prompt context path still uses the original ablation bundles and temporal policy; diagnosis-neutral bundles are only selected for track_diagnosis rows when explicitly requested.

static_render_attempt.reason: Local render spent over 90 seconds scanning the classified benchmark before producing artifacts. Code-path evidence and focused tests were used instead.
